title: Activation email submission fails with fetch error
symptom: When submitting an email for activation, the button spins indefinitely, and the console shows 'TypeError: Failed to fetch'. Additionally, a 403 error may appear in the network tab.
not_this_if: Direct access without a proxy works
No errors in the network tab
root_cause: This issue typically arises from a mismatch between the front-end and API base URLs or network restrictions preventing the container from reaching the activation endpoint. Incorrect environment variables or proxy settings can lead to failed requests.
fix_steps: Set the correct environment variables in your Docker setup: N8N_PROTOCOL, N8N_HOST, N8N_PORT, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, and WEBHOOK_URL.
Disable any proxy extras or CDN caching that might interfere with the requests.
Test the connection from within the container to ensure it can reach the internet.
agent_instruction: Configure the environment variables correctly and test the connection from the container.
